summary: The Messages-path collision is fixed, but the sibling count_tokens gateway path still uses raw client metadata.session_id against the same global vault map.

findings.title: count_tokens can still open a reserved per-key vault via raw metadata.session_id
findings.recommendation: Use the same centralized vault-key derivation here as proxyGatewayMessages: client session ids should become csid:<billeeUserId>:<session_id>, non-session count_tokens calls should use eph:<correlationId>, and tests should pin that metadata.session_id='gwkey:<victimKeyId>' on /messages/count_tokens does not reuse the victim's gwkey:<victimKeyId> vault.
